task: Implement D4: Background Jobs & Multithreading — async thread pool, hourly crawl job, last-updated API and dashboard UI (F006)
acceptanceCriteria: App boots; AsyncConfig registers ThreadPoolTaskExecutor (core=5, max=10, queue=100) and AsyncUncaughtExceptionHandler
SocialCrawlerService.crawlPost(@Async) saves SocialMetric with positive platform-seeded values and sets crawledAt
CrawlJobService.updateSocialMetricsJob(@Scheduled) fans out to crawlPost for each ACTIVE post and always updates lastCrawledAt
GET /metrics/last-updated returns lastCrawledAt ISO-8601 or null before first run
Dashboard shows Last Updated row: timestamp after run or Never before
All 61 tests pass including SocialCrawlerServiceTest, CrawlJobServiceTest, MetricControllerTest
blastRadius: DashboardController gained CrawlJobService dep — DashboardControllerTest updated
MetricController gained new endpoint + CrawlJobService dep
SocialAnalyticsApplicationTests gained @ActiveProfiles(test) to prevent scheduler against dev DB
